Each object contains the following fields: `contact_id`, which must be a string representing phone number in [E.164 format](https://www.twilio.com/docs/glossary/what-e164); `correlation_id`, a unique 32-character UUID used to uniquely map the request item with the response item; `sender_id`, which can be either a valid messaging service SID or a from phone number; `status`, a string representing the consent status.
